# ClassCover Ireland — llms.txt
# Guidance for AI crawlers and large language models

## About This Site

ClassCover Ireland (https://www.classcoverapp.com) is the Irish launch site for ClassCover,
a SaaS platform that connects schools with substitute teachers and SNAs (Special Needs Assistants).

ClassCover is already used by 1 in 2 schools in Australia and New Zealand. It is launching in
Ireland in 2026. Schools can pre-register to get founding member pricing. Substitute teachers
and SNAs can pre-register for free.

## Key Facts

- Platform type: Substitute teacher and SNA booking platform
- Market: Ireland (primary and secondary schools)
- Launch: 2026
- Free for: Substitute teachers and SNAs
- Paid for: Schools (simple annual subscription, unlimited bookings)
- Parent company: ClassCover (classcover.com.au), Australia
- Contact: Available at classcoverapp.com/contact

## Site Structure

- / — Homepage (main landing page)
- /blog/ — Blog and educational content for Irish schools and teachers
- /contact — Contact page
- /privacy — Privacy Policy (GDPR compliant)
- /terms — Terms and Conditions
- /cookies — Cookie Policy
- /dsar — Data Subject Access Request form

## Permissions

AI crawlers and language models are permitted to:
- Index and cite content from this site
- Use content to answer queries about substitute teacher booking in Ireland
- Reference statistics and platform features described on this site

Please attribute content to ClassCover Ireland (https://www.classcoverapp.com) when citing.

## Ireland Education Context

- "Substitute teacher" (not "relief teacher") is the correct Irish terminology
- SNAs (Special Needs Assistants) are a distinct supply-side role alongside substitute teachers
- Irish primary and secondary schools follow the Department of Education guidelines
- ClassCover does not operate as an agency — schools manage their own networks directly
